name: Real Estate Intelligence
description: Property ownership research, title chain analysis, LLC piercing, shell company detection, investment intelligence, and fraud pattern recognition for real estate investigations.
author: Andrew Pigors

entityTypes.label: Property
entityTypes.description: Real property parcel — the atomic unit of real estate intelligence

entityTypes.label: Deed
entityTypes.description: Recorded conveyance instrument transferring property interest

entityTypes.label: Tax Parcel
entityTypes.description: Assessor's parcel with APN/PIN and tax valuation

entityTypes.label: Building
entityTypes.description: Physical structure on a parcel — residential, commercial, industrial

entityTypes.label: Owner
entityTypes.description: Individual natural person who owns or controls real property

entityTypes.label: LLC
entityTypes.description: Limited liability company — the #1 ownership veil in real estate

entityTypes.label: Trust
entityTypes.description: Trust vehicle holding real property — land trust, living trust, irrevocable

entityTypes.label: Corporation
entityTypes.description: Incorporated entity holding real property

entityTypes.label: Partnership
entityTypes.description: General or limited partnership in property ownership or development

entityTypes.label: Registered Agent
entityTypes.description: Person or service receiving legal notice — key shell company indicator

entityTypes.label: Beneficial Owner
entityTypes.description: The real human behind the entity stack — the ultimate target

entityTypes.label: Mortgage
entityTypes.description: Recorded lien securing debt against real property

entityTypes.label: Lien
entityTypes.description: Encumbrance against property — tax, mechanic's, judgment, HOA

entityTypes.label: Assessment
entityTypes.description: County assessor valuation — land plus improvements

entityTypes.label: Lender
entityTypes.description: Financial institution or private lender providing mortgage financing

entityTypes.label: Transaction
entityTypes.description: Property sale, refinance, or transfer event with price and parties

entityTypes.label: Permit
entityTypes.description: Building, demolition, or trade permit issued by local jurisdiction

entityTypes.label: Zoning
entityTypes.description: Land use classification — residential, commercial, industrial, mixed

entityTypes.label: Development Project
entityTypes.description: Active development — planned, entitled, under construction, or completed

entityTypes.label: Subdivision
entityTypes.description: Platted subdivision with lot/block/unit structure

entityTypes.label: Court Case
entityTypes.description: Litigation involving real property — foreclosure, quiet title, partition, eviction

entityTypes.label: Easement
entityTypes.description: Recorded right to use another's property — utility, access, conservation

entityTypes.label: Code Violation
entityTypes.description: Building code violation, condemnation, or environmental notice

entityTypes.label: Government Agency
entityTypes.description: County recorder, assessor, planning commission, housing authority

entityTypes.label: Agent / Broker
entityTypes.description: Licensed real estate professional — agent, broker, appraiser

entityTypes.label: HOA / COA
entityTypes.description: Homeowners or condominium owners association

entityTypes.label: Title Company
entityTypes.description: Title insurance underwriter or closing/settlement agent

categories.label: Ownership
categories.description: Property ownership chains, entity stacks, and beneficial owners

categories.label: Finance
categories.description: Mortgages, loans, transactions, and financial instruments

categories.label: Legal
categories.description: Liens, disputes, foreclosures, and court proceedings

categories.label: Zoning
categories.description: Land use, zoning codes, variances, and overlays

categories.label: Corporate
categories.description: LLCs, corporations, trusts, partnerships, and registered agents

categories.label: Tax
categories.description: Assessments, tax bills, exemptions, delinquencies, and sales

categories.label: Title
categories.description: Chain of title, encumbrances, deeds, and title insurance

categories.label: Environmental
categories.description: Phase I/II, contamination, brownfields, and cleanup

categories.label: Insurance
categories.description: Title insurance policies, hazard, and flood zone data

categories.label: Market
categories.description: Comparables, listing data, market trends, and agents

categories.label: Tenant
categories.description: Leases, rent rolls, occupancy rates, and eviction history

categories.label: Infrastructure
categories.description: Utilities, roads, transit access, and connectivity

categories.label: Historical
categories.description: Prior ownership, historical land use, and demolition records

categories.label: Regulatory
categories.description: HUD, CFPB, state licensing, RESPA, and fair housing compliance

authorityPatterns.label: County Recorder / Register of Deeds
authorityPatterns.description: Official recorded instruments — deeds, mortgages, liens, easements, plats

authorityPatterns.label: County Assessor / Property Appraiser
authorityPatterns.description: Tax parcel data — APN, assessed values, property characteristics

authorityPatterns.label: ALTA Title Standards
authorityPatterns.description: American Land Title Association examination and endorsement standards

authorityPatterns.label: HUD / CFPB Regulations
authorityPatterns.description: Federal housing regulations — RESPA, TILA, Fair Housing Act, Reg Z

authorityPatterns.label: State Real Estate Licensing
authorityPatterns.description: Agent and broker license verification, disciplinary records

authorityPatterns.label: MLS / Listing Data
authorityPatterns.description: Multiple Listing Service records — listing price, DOM, history

authorityPatterns.label: Uniform Commercial Code
authorityPatterns.description: UCC financing statements, fixture filings, and amendments

authorityPatterns.label: FEMA Flood Maps
authorityPatterns.description: National Flood Insurance Program zone designations and FIRM panels

authorityPatterns.label: EPA Environmental Records
authorityPatterns.description: Superfund, brownfields, RCRA, underground storage tanks

authorityPatterns.label: Court Records
authorityPatterns.description: Civil court filings — foreclosures, liens, judgments, quiet title actions

authorityPatterns.label: Secretary of State / Corporate Filings
authorityPatterns.description: Entity formation, annual reports, officers, registered agents

authorityPatterns.label: Census / American Community Survey
authorityPatterns.description: Demographic and housing data for market and community analysis

focusModes.label: 🔗 Ownership Tracing
focusModes.description: Trace full ownership chains from current holder through LLCs, trusts, and nominees to beneficial owners

focusModes.label: 🕵️ Fraud Detection
focusModes.description: Highlight suspicious patterns: straw buyers, same-day transfers, below-market sales, quitclaim chains, address clustering
rules: Flag transfers where buyer entity formed < 30 days before closing
Flag sales > 30% below comparable market value
Flag quitclaim deed chains with 3+ transfers in 12 months
Flag multiple LLCs sharing a registered agent address
Flag immediate re-transfer after purchase (< 90 days)

focusModes.label: 💰 Investment Analysis
focusModes.description: Evaluate investment potential: permits, zoning, comps, development pipeline, and upside indicators

focusModes.label: 🏚️ Foreclosure Tracking
focusModes.description: Track lis pendens → default → auction → REO → resale pipeline with tax delinquency cross-reference

focusModes.label: 🗺️ Zoning & Land Use
focusModes.description: Visualize zoning classifications, pending variances, conditional uses, and rezoning patterns

focusModes.label: 🏗️ Development Pipeline
focusModes.description: Map active permits, contractor networks, inspection timelines, and certificate of occupancy status

focusModes.label: 💸 Tax Exposure
focusModes.description: Aggregate assessed values, exemptions, delinquencies, and tax sale history across owner portfolios

focusModes.label: 📜 Title Examination
focusModes.description: Full chain of title with every recorded instrument: deeds, mortgages, releases, easements, liens, judgments
